title: Archival Ink — Editorial Illustration
prompt: Transform the uploaded image into a museum-quality handcrafted editorial illustration featuring the main subject only. Created by an expert traditional illustrator using archival ink, pen-and-nib crosshatching, graphite detailing, and subtle watercolor wash techniques on aged fine-art paper. Preserve the exact identity, facial structure, expression, pose, and all unique characteristics including clothing and accessories. The composition must feel entirely hand-drawn through thousands of organically flowing ink strokes, layered crosshatching, contour lines, sketch marks, and stippling. Apply subtle sepia-toned watercolor stains, paper aging effects, ink splatters, and coffee-wash textures throughout the background. Final illustration should feel like a rare collector's edition artwork from a high-end art journal.
